result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate kind version data from GitHub releases

Usage:
  KindVersionData [options]

Options:
  -c, --count <count>  Number of kind versions to output [default: 5]
  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate kind version data from GitHub releases

Usage:
  KindVersionData [options]

Options:

  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
